title: Island Shader Panorama
description: My custom panorama with shaders on an island.
body:
# Description
A panorama of an island I built in the Mounts of Mayhem update. It showcases the relatively new nautilus mob along with a horse and a coppr golem. 


## How I Made it
I followed the panorama tutorial from the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Making_custom_panoramas). Im pretty sure that I used Solas Shaders for the panorama
